CustomField.formula: IF( DATE( YEAR(TODAY()), CASE( MonthFiscalYrEnds__c, "Jan", 1, "Feb", 2, "Mar", 3, "Apr", 4, "May", 5, "Jun", 6, "Jul", 7, "Aug", 8, "Sept", 9, "Oct", 10, "Nov", 11, "Dec", 12, "",NULL, 0 /* Default value if none of the above matches */ ), CASE( MonthFiscalYrEnds__c, "Jan", 31, "Feb", IF(MOD(YEAR(TODAY()), 4) = 0, 29, 28), "Mar", 31, "Apr", 30, "May", 31, "Jun", 30, "Jul", 31, "Aug", 31, "Sept", 30, "Oct", 31, "Nov", 30, "Dec", 31, "",NULL, 0 /* Default value if none of the above matches */ ) ) < TODAY(), DATE( YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, CASE( MonthFiscalYrEnds__c, "Jan", 1, "Feb", 2, "Mar", 3, "Apr", 4, "May", 5, "Jun", 6, "Jul", 7, "Aug", 8, "Sept", 9, "Oct", 10, "Nov", 11, "Dec", 12, "",NULL, 0 /* Default value if none of the above matches */ ), CASE( MonthFiscalYrEnds__c, "Jan", 31, "Feb", IF(MOD(YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, 4) = 0, 29, 28), "Mar", 31, "Apr", 30, "May", 31, "Jun", 30, "Jul", 31, "Aug", 31, "Sept", 30, "Oct", 31, "Nov", 30, "Dec", 31, "",NULL, 0 /* Default value if none of the above matches */ ) ), DATE( YEAR(TODAY()), CASE( MonthFiscalYrEnds__c, "Jan", 1, "Feb", 2, "Mar", 3, "Apr", 4, "May", 5, "Jun", 6, "Jul", 7, "Aug", 8, "Sept", 9, "Oct", 10, "Nov", 11, "Dec", 12, "",NULL, 0 /* Default value if none of the above matches */ ), CASE( MonthFiscalYrEnds__c, "Jan", 31, "Feb", IF(MOD(YEAR(TODAY()), 4) = 0, 29, 28), "Mar", 31, "Apr", 30, "May", 31, "Jun", 30, "Jul", 31, "Aug", 31, "Sept", 30, "Oct", 31, "Nov", 30, "Dec", 31, "",NULL, 0 /* Default value if none of the above matches */ ) ) )
CustomField.label: Currect Fiscal Year End
